articles.title: BBL sell off gets the go-ahead from cricket powerbrokers, but it comes with conditions
articles.description: State associations have reached an “in-principle” agreement with the governing body over the Big Bash League, but four key requirements need to be met.
articles.content: Cricket Australia chief executive Todd Greenberg says state associations have reached an in-principle agreement to privatise the Big Bash League, but it cannot proceed without getting approval from t… [+246 chars]

articles.title: What we learned from watching the 1992 World Cup final in full again | ESPNcricinfo.com
articles.description: Wides, lbw calls, swing - plenty of things were different in white-ball cricket back then | ESPNcricinfo.com
articles.content: Last week, we at ESPNcricinfo did something we have been thinking of doing for eight years now: pretend-live ball-by-ball commentary for a classic cricket match. We knew the result, yes, but we tried… [+6823 chars]
